nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog. Partly cloudy. Low around 17, with temperatures rising to around 21 overnight. North wind around 2 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Snow then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 8am, then a chance of snow between 8am and 11am. Partly sunny, with a high near 42. Southwest wind 2 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 26, with temperatures rising to around 28 overnight. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.shortForecast: Light Snow then Rain And Snow
nws.detailedForecast: Snow before 10am, then rain and snow between 10am and 4pm, then rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 50. Southwest wind 8 to 31 mph, with gusts as high as 53 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and snow before 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 19. Northwest wind 15 to 31 mph, with gusts as high as 52 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Light Snow
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of snow after 1pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 34. East wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 21. Southeast wind around 7 mph. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: Snow likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 32. East wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. New snow accumulation of 1 to 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Snow likely. Cloudy, with a low around 11. Northeast wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. New snow accumulation of 2 to 4 inches possible.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Snow likely before 1pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 24. North wind around 16 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. New snow accumulation of 1 to 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 6. Northwest wind 7 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 27. Northwest wind 7 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow after 7pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 15. Southeast wind around 9 mph.
